evidence_summary: Establish the lethal environmental hazard of the scarlet poppy meadow through the physical collapse of key characters. The sequence must transition from a peaceful, heavy atmosphere to high-stakes urgency as the non-affected characters realize their compani...
The deadly scent takes effect. Dorothy and Toto fall into a deep sleep. The Cowardly Lion, unable to be easily moved by the others, also succumbs to the poppies and falls asleep.
Characters walking through dense, heavy floral growth.
A cluster of sleeping characters surrounded by unaffected observers.
The scent induces sleep in Dorothy, Toto, and the Lion.
